mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(q.QUERY_ID) AS queryId, TRIM(q.QUERY_NAME) AS queryName, TRIM(q.SQL_GROUP_ID) AS sqlGroupId, TRIM(g.SQL_GROUP_NAME) AS sqlGroupName, TRIM(q.DB_ID) AS dbId, TRIM(c.DB_NAME) AS dbName, TRIM(q.SQL_TYPE) AS sqlType, TRIM(q.EXEC_TYPE) AS execType, q.CACHE_YN AS cacheYn, TRIM(q.TIME_OUT) AS timeOut, TRIM(q.RESULT_TYPE) AS resultType, q.USE_YN AS useYn, q.SQL_QUERY AS sqlQuery, q.SQL_QUERY2 AS sqlQuery2, TRIM(q.QUERY_DESC) AS queryDesc, q.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, TRIM(q.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_SQL_QUERY q LEFT JOIN FWK_SQL_CONF c ON TRIM(q.DB_ID) = TRIM(c.DB_ID) LEFT JOIN FWK_SQL_GROUP g ON TRIM(q.SQL_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(g.SQL_GROUP_ID) WHERE TRIM(q.QUERY_ID) = TRIM(#{queryId})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_SQL_QUERY WHERE TRIM(QUERY_ID) = TRIM(#{queryId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_SQL_QUERY ( QUERY_ID, QUERY_NAME, SQL_GROUP_ID, DB_ID, SQL_TYPE, EXEC_TYPE, CACHE_YN, TIME_OUT, RESULT_TYPE, USE_YN, SQL_QUERY, SQL_QUERY2, QUERY_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.queryId}, #{dto.queryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.sqlGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.dbId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.sqlType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.execType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.cacheYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.timeOut, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.resultType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.sqlQuery, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.sqlQuery2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.queryDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_SQL_QUERY SET QUERY_NAME = #{dto.queryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SQL_GROUP_ID = #{dto.sqlGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DB_ID = #{dto.dbId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SQL_TYPE = #{dto.sqlType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXEC_TYPE = #{dto.execType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CACHE_YN = #{dto.cacheYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TIME_OUT = #{dto.timeOut, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESULT_TYPE = #{dto.resultType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_YN = #{dto.useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SQL_QUERY = #{dto.sqlQuery, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SQL_QUERY2 = #{dto.sqlQuery2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QUERY_DESC = #{dto.queryDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE TRIM(QUERY_ID) = TRIM(#{queryId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FWK_SQL_QUERY WHERE TRIM(QUERY_ID) = TRIM(#{queryId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_SQL_QUERY q LEFT JOIN FWK_SQL_GROUP g ON TRIM(q.SQL_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(g.SQL_GROUP_ID)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_SQL_QUERY_HIS ( VERSION_ID, QUERY_ID, QUERY_NAME, SQL_GROUP_ID, DB_ID, SQL_QUERY, SQL_QUERY2, QUERY_DESC, SQL_TYPE, EXEC_TYPE, CACHE_YN, TIME_OUT, RESULT_TYPE, USE_YN, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, HISTORY_REASON ) VALUES ( #{versionId}, #{data.queryId}, #{data.queryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data.sqlGroupId}, #{data.dbId}, #{data.sqlQuery}, #{data.sqlQuery2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data.queryDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data.sqlType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data.execType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data.cacheYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data.timeOut, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data.resultType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data.useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{backupDtime}, #{backupUserId}, '수정전 자동백업' )
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TRIM(SQL_GROUP_ID) AS groupId, TRIM(SQL_GROUP_NAME) AS groupName FROM FWK_SQL_GROUP
AND (TRIM(SQL_GROUP_ID) LIKE '%' || TRIM(#{keyword}) || '%' OR TRIM(SQL_GROUP_NAME) LIKE '%' || TRIM(#{keyword}) || '%')
ORDER BY SQL_GROUP_ID ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_SQL_QUERY SET USE_YN = #{useYn}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE TRIM(QUERY_ID) = TRIM(#{queryId})
mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(VERSION_ID) AS versionId, TRIM(QUERY_ID) AS queryId, TRIM(QUERY_NAME) AS queryName, TRIM(SQL_GROUP_ID) AS sqlGroupId, TRIM(DB_ID) AS dbId, TRIM(SQL_TYPE) AS sqlType, TRIM(EXEC_TYPE) AS execType, TRIM(CACHE_YN) AS cacheYn, TRIM(TIME_OUT) AS timeOut, TRIM(RESULT_TYPE) AS resultType, TRIM(USE_YN) AS useYn, SQL_QUERY AS sqlQuery, SQL_QUERY2 AS sqlQuery2, TRIM(QUERY_DESC) AS queryDesc, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, TRIM(LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) AS lastUpdateUserId, TRIM(HISTORY_REASON) AS historyReason FROM FWK_SQL_QUERY_HIS WHERE TRIM(QUERY_ID) = TRIM(#{queryId}) ORDER BY VERSION_ID DESC

SELECT TRIM(VERSION_ID) AS versionId, TRIM(QUERY_ID) AS queryId, TRIM(QUERY_NAME) AS queryName, TRIM(SQL_GROUP_ID) AS sqlGroupId, TRIM(DB_ID) AS dbId, TRIM(SQL_TYPE) AS sqlType, TRIM(EXEC_TYPE) AS execType, TRIM(CACHE_YN) AS cacheYn, TRIM(TIME_OUT) AS timeOut, TRIM(RESULT_TYPE) AS resultType, TRIM(USE_YN) AS useYn, SQL_QUERY AS sqlQuery, SQL_QUERY2 AS sqlQuery2, TRIM(QUERY_DESC) AS queryDesc, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, TRIM(LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) AS lastUpdateUserId, TRIM(HISTORY_REASON) AS historyReason FROM FWK_SQL_QUERY_HIS WHERE TRIM(QUERY_ID) = TRIM(#{queryId}) AND TRIM(VERSION_ID) = TRIM(#{versionId})

SELECT TRIM(q.QUERY_ID) AS queryId, TRIM(q.QUERY_NAME) AS queryName, TRIM(q.SQL_GROUP_ID) AS sqlGroupId, TRIM(g.SQL_GROUP_NAME) AS sqlGroupName, TRIM(q.DB_ID) AS dbId, TRIM(c.DB_NAME) AS dbName, TRIM(q.SQL_TYPE) AS sqlType, TRIM(q.EXEC_TYPE) AS execType, q.CACHE_YN AS cacheYn, TRIM(q.TIME_OUT) AS timeOut, TRIM(q.RESULT_TYPE) AS resultType, q.USE_YN AS useYn, TRIM(q.QUERY_DESC) AS queryDesc, q.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, TRIM(q.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_SQL_QUERY q LEFT JOIN FWK_SQL_CONF c ON TRIM(q.DB_ID) = TRIM(c.DB_ID) LEFT JOIN FWK_SQL_GROUP g ON TRIM(q.SQL_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(g.SQL_GROUP_ID)
ORDER BY TRIM(q.QUERY_ID) ASC
